title: Active's Mod Folder
description: My Mod Folder - Made for all kinds of PVP gamemodes
body:
My PVP mod folder, featuring **FPS optimizations**, making the **game load up faster**, along with **useful PVP mods** that will improve hit responsiveness and reducing perceived latency during combat and mods that help with high ping issues like delayed hits or slow crystal speed

### **and a lot more!**

- All these mods are perfectly allowed on server like flowpvp, mcpvp and other servers.
- If you are unsure these mods aren't allowed, create a ticket or talk to one of the server staff members if they're allowed or not.
